contentBlocks.original:
ॐकारं बिंदुसंयुक्तं नित्यं ध्यायन्ति योगिनः
कामदं मोक्षदं चैव ॐकाराय नमो नमः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃkāraṃ biṃdusaṃyuktaṃ nityaṃ dhyāyanti yoginaḥ
kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ caiva oṃkārāya namo namaḥ
contentBlocks.translation: The yogis constantly meditate upon Oṃ united with the bindu (the dot above ॐ). This Oṃ fulfills all desires and grants liberation. I bow again and again to Oṃ.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐकारं (oṃkāraṃ) – Oṃ sound; बिंदुसंयुक्तं (biṃdusaṃyuktaṃ) – united with the bindu (bindu:dot | saṃyuktaṃ:united with); नित्यं (nityaṃ) – constantly; ध्यायन्ति (dhyāyanti) – meditate; योगिनः (yoginaḥ) – yogis; कामदं (kāmadaṃ) – fulfilling desires; मोक्षदं (mokṣadaṃ) – granting liberation; च (ca) – and; एव (eva) – indeed; ॐकाराय (oṃkārāya) – to Oṃ; नमः (namaḥ) – bow; नमः (namaḥ) – bow;
